final:
module top_module(
    input [7:0] CprogH,
	 input [7:0] CprogM,
	 input [7:0] CprogS,
    input [7:0] CcountH,
	 input [7:0] CcountM,
	 input [7:0] CcountS,
    input en,
    input reset,
	 input clock,
    output reg fout
    );always @(posedge clock)
	begin
	if (reset)fout<=0;
	else if (en)
		begin
		if(CprogH==CcountH&&CprogM==CcountM&&CprogS==CcountS&&(CprogH!=0||CprogM!=0||CprogS!=0))fout<=1;
		else fout<=0;
		end
	end
endmodule
